title: elasmatium
intro: Elasmatium, also known as Indian elm, is a plant species belonging to the Ulmaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Elasmatium include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. Herbal preparations of Elasmatium include decoctions, infusions, and powders, often used to treat various ailments, but it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
